effects_provenance.raw: Tuscan Gelato THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Tuscan Gelato THCA Flower is a flavorful indica-leaning hybrid created from the fusion of Blue Gelato and Tuscan Dream . The cultivar produces dense, well-structured buds with a bright inviting aromatic profile combining citrus zest, sweet berries, and a touch of floral funk with soft earthy undertones that round it out. Effects Tuscan Gelato delivers a smooth, uplifting experience with a dessert-like finish that balances cerebral lift with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of refreshing character that distinguishes Gelato-family hybrids. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: bright citrus zest up front, with sweet berries through the middle and a creamy gelato finish on the exhale. Smoke is silky and unmistakably bright. The terpene profile reads citrus-berry-and-cream — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Tuscan Gelato harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Tuscan Gelato THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Tuscan Gelato THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. effects_provenance.raw: Lemon Cherry Gelato – THCa Flower Size: 14g, Quantity:: 1 Pack Premium THCa Hemp Flower Lemon Cherry Gelato Strain (Indica Dominant) 35.6% Total THCa 100% Naturally Grown 3rd Party Lab Tested Federal Farm Bill Compliant *** We do not ship to California. *** Lemon Cherry Gelato THCA Flower Lemon Cherry Gelato THCA flower delivers one of the most sought-after profiles in hemp-derived cannabis: dense, frost-coated buds with a sweet cherry-citrus aroma and a smooth, dessert-like finish. Each batch is indoor-grown, hand-trimmed, and third-party lab-tested so you know exactly what’s in the jar before it ships. Lemon Cherry Gelato Strain Profile Lemon Cherry Gelato, often shortened to “LCG” is a slightly indica-dominant hybrid (roughly 60% indica / 40% sativa) created by crossing Sunset Sherbet with Girl Scout Cookies . That pairing is responsible for its standout looks: chunky, conical buds that run from deep green to flashes of purple, blanketed in trichomes. Spec Detail Strain type Indica-dominant hybrid (~60/40) Lineage Sunset Sherbet × Girl Scout Cookies THCA content See current COA (listed on product) Dominant terpenes Caryophyllene, Limonene, Myrcene Grow Indoor, hand-trimmed Aroma & Flavor The name is the tasting note. Lemon Cherry Gelato leads with bright lemon and ripe cherry, rolls into sweet berry and creamy gelato, and finishes with a faint earthy-pine undertone. The limonene-forward terpene profile is what gives it that citrus-candy top note, while caryophyllene adds a subtle peppery depth on the exhale. Effects & What to Expect As an indica-leaning hybrid, Lemon Cherry Gelato is generally enjoyed as a relaxed, easygoing strain, mellow and unwinding without being heavy at moderate amounts. Many users reach for it in the evening or on a low-key day off. As with any THCA flower, start low and go slow to find your own comfortable amount. Lab Results (COA) Every batch of our Lemon Cherry Gelato THCA flower ships with a Certificate of Analysis (COA) from an accredited third-party lab, confirming cannabinoid content and screening for pesticides, heavy metals, and microbials. You can view the current COA on this product page before you buy. Transparency is the standard for everything we grow. How Lemon Cherry Gelato Compares If you like LCG, you’ll likely enjoy our other dessert-and-fruit hybrids. Gelato 42 THCA Flower shares the creamy Gelato backbone, while Animal Runtz THCA Flower brings a sweeter, candy-forward prof

effects_provenance.raw: Sharpiez THCA Flower Supreme / 28g Strain Profile Sharpiez THCA Flower is a potent hybrid built on a stacked pedigree: Permanent Marker crossed with Zoap . The cross combines two of the loudest modern strains into a single connoisseur-grade cultivar — dense buds, heavy trichome coverage, and a pungent, gas-edged aromatic profile that's instantly recognizable in the jar. Effects Sharpiez hits hard. The cerebral onset is fast and intense, settling into deep body relaxation that earns its top-shelf reputation. Expect heightened creativity, pronounced euphoria, and serious decompression. Best paired with downtime, evening use, or any setting where intensity and flavor character are the appeal. Flavor & Aroma On the nose: pungent gas and ink-like funk up front, with a sweet-and-soapy middle and a warm earthy finish on the exhale. Smoke is full, complex, and unmistakably loud. The terpene profile reads gas-and-funk with sweet undercurrents — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Sharpiez harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Sharpiez THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Sharpiez THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. The cultivar produces dense, frost-coated buds with an aromatic profile bursting with tropical fruit, candy sweetness, and creamy vanilla layered over a subtle gassy undertone. Effects Richboy Runtz delivers a balanced experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of decadent character that distinguishes premium Runtz crosses. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: juicy berries up front, with citrus candy through the middle and a smooth dessert-rich finish on the exhale. Smoke is silky and unmistakably layered. The terpene profile reads fruit-candy-and-vanilla — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Richboy Runtz harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Richboy Runtz THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Richboy Runtz THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. effects_provenance.raw: Cherry Pie THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Cherry Pie THCA Flower is a legendary, Indica-dominant hybrid that has long been celebrated as a staple in elite West Coast genetics. It begins with a bright, euphoric burst of mental clarity that instantly lifts the mood, melts away stress, and sparks a relaxed, creative mindset. Before long, the heavy Indica lineage takes over, sending a warm, soothing physical relaxation radiating through the body.
